programme.title: All American
programme.desc: Spencer finder ud af den virkelige grund til, hvorfor hans far gik sin vej og er knust over sandheden. Billy m‘rker f›lgerne fra sin fortid, og Coop pr›ver at stoppe en plan, hun har lagt.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a home that's full of surprises in California. They work to modernize the house to appeal to the modern-day buyer.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: A high-stakes charter gets off to a rocky start when Jenna's cabin mistake puts the interior team under scrutiny. Chef Ben pushes Ellie past her limits and forces Capt. Jason to restore order.

programme.title: The Floor Australia
programme.desc: Our 56 remaining players duke it out for the $10,000 nightly bonus prize. Tonight it's the battle of the Travel Guides. Who will come out on top?

programme.title: Beach Hunters
programme.desc: After a lifetime of moving, this family of three wants a home with a beach and endless water views. S5 E13.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple goes from renting to buying a home in Kill Devil Hills, NC. They love surfing and hiking, so want access to the ocean and nature. S18 E5.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Hollywood family scouts London for a blockbuster home on an indie film budget. S172 E13.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple gives up their custom home for more family time in Beaconsfield, England. But the adjustment from luxurious Texas spaces may be a challenge.

programme.title: ThreeNews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat AU
programme.desc: With life changing cash on the line, everyday Aussies will have the opportunity to walk away with cash prizes up to $1,000,000.

programme.title: David Lomas Breakthrough
programme.desc: New Zealand born Tammy was raised in Australia knowing she was Maori but disconnected from her culture. Now she wants to find her birth mother and cultural identity.

programme.title: All New 9-1-1
programme.desc: Eddie and Buck's flight to Los Angeles is cancelled. For Hen's birthday they start a road trip, but they get lost and Buck disappears.

programme.title: Alert: Missing Persons Unit
programme.desc: When a limousine filled with teenagers -- including a Senator's son -- is hijacked on the way to prom, MPU discovers that the ex-girlfriend of one of the victims may have been the actual target.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: A high-stakes charter gets off to a rocky start when Jenna's cabin mistake puts the interior team under scrutiny. Chef Ben pushes Ellie past her limits and forces Capt. Jason to restore order.

programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: A father lunges at a serial killer, a defendant attempts to stab an attorney, and an officer tasers an Alaskan wildlife enthusiast.

programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: As Thanksgiving approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a feast. Eivin and Eve rescue a baby seal on the beach and there's a beetle infestation on the homestead. S9 E8.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A Californian family longing for ranch life in central Texas find themselves on a homestead that requires a total makeover by the Raneys.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: In an effort to please Salen, Andrews takes on a high-profile case and assigns Shaun and Allen to help perform a risky surgery to restore the voice of a famous pop star.

programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: Emily is on the hunt for answers, and enlists Ezra's help in finding out more about Cyrus and his past connection to Alison.

programme.title: All American
programme.desc: Spencer suffers a devastating setback and gets strength from an unlikely source. Plus, Billy faces some tough truths to get his family back.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in California, where they find some outdated designs and others that are in-style once again.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Lisa gives Marcus an opportunity to DJ a premiere party at SUR. Shayne dates two girls at the same time. Audrey tells Angelica about Chris and Jason's other job, which leads to explosive consequences.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: The competitors take on ingredients that would usually be thrown away in hopes of turning edible trash into culinary treasures.

programme.title: Beach Hunters
programme.desc: A couple looks for a relaxing retreat along the beaches of Galveston, TX, where they can unwind. S5 E14.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple is tired of staying with family while visiting Kill Devil Hills. They want a move-in ready home with a yard for their dogs. S18 E6.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A woman struggles to persuade her Australian boyfriend to give up his shed dreams for a family home. S173 E1.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A family looks to leave their San Francisco life behind to pursue a better balance of work, play and family time in Christchurch, New Zealand.

programme.title: ThreeNews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat AU
programme.desc: With life changing cash on the line, everyday Aussies will have the opportunity to walk away with cash prizes up to $1,000,000.

programme.title: My House My Castle
programme.desc: The Bay of Plenty is a beach lover's dream. But is the sand really golden, or just sun-struck hype? We explore what life is really like by the sea.

programme.title: House Hunters Australia
programme.desc: Ben and Bec search for their first home, but Ben wants something functional and close to family while Bec prioritizes space for her creative pursuits.

programme.title: All New Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Will wants a larger kitchen and open space, but Katie loves their current home. With mum Kyoko having the final say, it's head versus heart when the family clash.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Digi Diggers need to explore new ground after mining opal too brittle to sell. The Bushmen find their new claim has been dug out by opal thieves.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Lisa gives Marcus an opportunity to DJ a premiere party at SUR. Shayne dates two girls at the same time. Audrey tells Angelica about Chris and Jason's other job, which leads to explosive consequences.

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: From stealing gators to eating cheesecake naked in a swamp, the wildly unpredictable Florida Man has been caught on tape in his bizarre habitat!

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Eivin and August make a unique hay baler that will ease their load if it doesn't set them on fire! And, the family go salmon fishing at the Copper River. S9 E9.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A pair of homesteaders and their livestock are mired in muddy clay in the East Georgia woods. The Raneys must fix it before the next big rains.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Salen takes extreme measures when she learns that the surgical staff have joined Lim's efforts against her; the team treats a liver transplant patient whose organ donor unwittingly gave him cancer.

programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: With Alison leading them down a dangerous path and 'A' barring them from telling the police the truth, Aria, Emily, Hanna and Spencer feel trapped and are desperate to find a way out of this mess.

programme.title: All American
programme.desc: Spencer faces a decision that could transform his reputation, Billy realizes he needs to make major changes, and Grace and Corey have a tough conversation about their family.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a good lead. The home is dirty and dated, with a large fireplace in the center that will cost a fortune to update.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of London: The New R
programme.desc: Amanda, Juliet Mayhew, and Nessie all find themselves in the hot seat.
